## Core Profile Summary
Computer Engineering MSc (completed July 2026, 18/20 average) with professional experience re-engineering delivery infrastructure, improving engineering velocity, and integrating AI into engineering workflows. Demonstrated through a full re-engineering engagement at a technology company and formalized in a master's thesis applying Lean principles to CI/CD and process re-engineering. Built a cooperative from inception and ran it through its full operational lifecycle. Combines systems-level thinking, Lean methodology, and hands-on AI tooling across engineering and operational contexts. Complementary background: VR/AR, digital twins, 3D modelling/printing, technical visualization, cybersecurity/offensive security, and applied AI (CNNs, YOLO, RNNs, LLMs).

## Professional Experience

### Software Quality Engineer - Glartek (Sep 2025 - Jun 2026)
Portugal. Glartek builds an AI-native, mobile-first, no-code EHSQ Connected Worker / AR digital-twin platform for frontline industrial operations.
**Framing rule:** this is delivery-infrastructure re-engineering and process improvement; the QA/testing layer is where the work happened, not the identity. Title is always "Software Quality Engineer" (never "QA Engineer"), no "Internship" qualifier.
- Designed and implemented a full end-to-end test framework in Playwright, with reusable helpers/utilities for scalable, maintainable e2e coverage
- Integrated the automated test battery into GitLab CI pipeline jobs for fully automated execution in the delivery workflow
- Redesigned test infrastructure and processes: **>50%** time/resource savings in automated cycles
- Re-engineered QA/CI workflows, supporting **up to 20%** faster feature deployment
- Restructured task distribution and handovers: **~30%** time reduction, duplicate work eliminated
- Standardized test naming/data conventions; introduced seed-driven data setup to cut coupling and instability
- Led the Cypress → Playwright migration: trade-off evaluation, implementation, documentation
- Maintained/extended an existing Cypress battery; analyzed reports and failure patterns to prioritize high-impact fixes
- Built AI agent skills (**Claude Code**) deployed in internal engineering repos for automated assistance on complex workflows
- Contributed to architecture + testing of an embedded AI chatbot (in-app navigation) and a RAG system (users query their own uploaded documents)
- Collaborated on an in-house YOLO image-recognition application: dataset curation/purification, detection-class definition, training tests, optimization strategies

### Founder & President - Florescer, non-profit cooperative (Jan 2023 - May 2026)
Portugal. Local educational, social, and environmental initiatives.
- Founded and built the cooperative from scratch: legal incorporation, administrative setup, governance structure, ongoing compliance
- Owned the full entrepreneurial process, idea to operational execution, with no prior institutional support
- Coordinated partnerships with public and private institutions to fund community programmes
- Led educational activities, community workshops, and public-space renovation initiatives
- Managed the full physical setup and operational launch of a café/restaurant space and a nursing-school space
- Hands-on building maintenance and renovation: painting, plumbing, basic electrical work

### Warehouse Manager Assistant - Airking (Jul 2020 - Sep 2020)
Portugal. Logistics and warehouse operations.
- Organized inventory, materials, and warehouse/storage flows
- Optimized storage and transport procedures: **up to 20%** improvement in handling/distribution time
- Supported picking, dispatch, transport, retrieval; forklift load handling; technical assembly support

### Hospitality Consultant - IMPACT Consulting (Jul 2018 - Aug 2018)
Malta. Early consulting role abroad, research and business outreach.
- Built Excel-based databases from publicly available company information
- Conducted company/individual outreach for partnership opportunities
- Produced documentation linking travel agencies/operators and hospitality brands

## Independent Projects
<!-- Full write-ups in documents/usi/usi-content.md; select per role -->
- **Niche-Field SaaS Marketing & Admin Platform** (solo, end-to-end): multi-tenant SaaS. pnpm monorepo, React+Vite, Express serverless on Vercel, PostgreSQL/Drizzle, Zod-driven end-to-end type safety, stateless JWT auth, Cloudflare R2 presigned uploads, Upstash rate limiting, Playwright e2e suite
- **Shared Expense Tracker** (solo): serverless PWA. Supabase + Postgres Row-Level Security (no custom server), Google OAuth, custom ~60-line reactive layer over useSyncExternalStore, hash routing, Workbox PWA, Vercel static hosting
- **Minimal Local RAG System** (Python + Ollama): from-scratch ~110-line local RAG over own project docs; built recall@k eval harness and caught own evaluation being too permissive (recall@1 71% → true 14% after chunk-level ground truth)
- **USI - Unified Source of Information**: person-agnostic single-source-of-truth corpus (tagged Markdown blocks, audience gating, Python export API) powering CV automation, portfolio site, and AI context packs
- **Big Data VR Visualization** (BSc final project): NO2 air-pollution VR visualization (VTK, OpenXR, Unity), user study VR vs desktop. Supervisor: Prof. Paulo Dias (IRIS group, IEETA, University of Aveiro)
- **Digital Twin & Animal Tracking App**: real-time digital twin of tracked animals with AR spatial view (A-Frame), Kotlin + React Native + Firebase
- **1:1 Architectural VR Walkthrough**: client-facing 1:1 building models in Unity, desktop + VR
- **SIEM Implementation**: Wazuh + Elastic Stack; log ingestion pipelines, dashboards, detection rules, FIM/HIDS, validated against simulated attacks
- **Cybersecurity Assessment & Footprinting**: real-world OSINT/footprinting assessment for a client, prioritized remediation report, findings presented to client
- **Sign Language Recognition**: image-to-text at **98%** classification accuracy (BSc ML capstone)
- **CNN Match Classification (League of Legends)**: multiclass-multilabel CNN; Transfer Learning and Optuna-optimized variants
- **YOLO Multi-Class Object Detection**; **RNN Sequence Prediction**; **MATLAB physics/maths simulations**; **SPSS statistical analysis**
- **Game Design & Development**: Unity (C#), Godot, Blender; VRChat world/asset publishing
- **Maker practice**: 3D modelling (Blender) and FDM printing, rapid prototyping at home
- **Mobile Client-Management App**: React Native + Firebase for a cooperative
